# cloudflare_secrets_store_secret (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String) The Account ID to use for the Secrets Store Secret.
- `name` (String) Name of the secret.
- `secret_text` (String, Sensitive) The secret value.
- `store_id` (String) The ID of the Secrets Store.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Comment describing the secret.
- `scopes` (Set of String) List of scopes for the secret.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the secret was created.
- `id` (String) Secrets Store Secret identifier.
- `modified_at` (String) The timestamp when the secret was last modified.
- `status` (String) Status of the secret.

## Import


~> This resource does not currently support `terraform import`.
